join_order.notes: Load sub/fy.bin as flat int16_t array indexed by adsh_code (172 KB). O(1) probe: sub_fy[adsh_code] == 2023. No hash table needed.
Build is_map: uint64_t key=(adsh_code<<32|tagver_code) -> uint32_t pre_row_index. ~1.73M entries. Probe returns pre_row for plabel decode and as group key component.

filters.notes: Treat NaN/sentinel as null if applicable; otherwise skip check if column has no nulls

data_structures.sub_fy_array: flat_array(int16_t[86135]) indexed by adsh_code — 172 KB, fits in L3
data_structures.thread_local_agg: compact_hash_map<uint64_t, {double sum_value, int64_t cnt}>(pre_sized=16384) key=(adsh_code<<32|pre_row) per thread
data_structures.merged_agg: compact_hash_map<uint64_t, {double sum_value, int64_t cnt}>(pre_sized=131072) after thread merge

parallelism.notes: Pre-processing (is_map build, sub load) single-threaded or 2-thread parallel. Main scan over num fully parallel with morsel dispatch. Merge agg maps after all threads complete.

indexes.expected_blocks_skipped: ~5% (87% uom=USD density, few blocks fully excluded)

aggregation.merge: iterate thread-local maps and merge into global map with addition

decode: stmt: fixed string 'IS' (all result rows pass stmt='IS' filter)
output.topk_strategy: partial_sort or nth_element + sort on 100K groups
